# ============================================================================
# auth/jwt.fl - JWT 토큰 시스템
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: JWT 생성, 검증, 갱신

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# JWT 구조
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct JwtHeader
  alg: string              # "HS256"
  typ: string              # "JWT"

struct JwtClaims
  sub: string              # subject (userId)
  email: string
  name: string
  role: string
  iat: number              # issued at
  exp: number              # expiration time

struct JwtToken
  header: JwtHeader
  claims: JwtClaims
  signature: string

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 생성
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn createAccessToken
  input: (userId: string, email: string, name: string, role: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Access Token 생성 (15분 만료)\"
  do
    let now = getCurrentTimestamp()
    let expiresIn = 15 * 60  # 15분 (초)

    let header = {
      alg: \"HS256\",
      typ: \"JWT\"
    }

    let claims = {
      sub: userId,
      email: email,
      name: name,
      role: role,
      iat: now,
      exp: now + expiresIn
    }

    # JWT 생성
    match encodeAndSign(header, claims, secret)
      Ok(token) => Ok(token)
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn createRefreshToken
  input: (userId: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Refresh Token 생성 (7일 만료)\"
  do
    let now = getCurrentTimestamp()
    let expiresIn = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60  # 7일 (초)

    let header = {
      alg: \"HS256\",
      typ: \"JWT\"
    }

    let claims = {
      sub: userId,
      email: \"\",      # 반드시 필요하지 않음
      name: \"\",
      role: \"refresh\",  # 특수 역할
      iat: now,
      exp: now + expiresIn
    }

    match encodeAndSign(header, claims, secret)
      Ok(token) => Ok(token)
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn createTokenPair
  input: (userId: string, email: string, name: string, role: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<TokenPair, string>
  intent: \"Access + Refresh 토큰 쌍 생성\"
  do
    match createAccessToken(userId, email, name, role, secret)
      Ok(accessToken) => {
        match createRefreshToken(userId, secret)
          Ok(refreshToken) => {
            Ok({
              accessToken: accessToken,
              refreshToken: refreshToken,
              expiresIn: 900,  # 15분 (초)
              tokenType: \"Bearer\"
            })
          }
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 검증
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn verifyToken
  input: (token: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<JwtClaims, string>
  intent: \"토큰 검증\"
  do
    # 토큰 포맷 확인 (header.payload.signature)
    match validateTokenFormat(token)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    # 서명 검증
    match verifySignature(token, secret)
      Err(e) => return Err(\"Invalid signature: \" + e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    # 클레임 추출
    match decodeToken(token)
      Ok(jwt) => {
        # 만료 확인
        let now = getCurrentTimestamp()
        if now > jwt.claims.exp
          return Err(\"Token expired\")

        Ok(jwt.claims)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn validateTokenFormat
  input: token: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"토큰 형식 검증\"
  do
    # header.payload.signature 형식 확인
    let parts = splitString(token, \".\")
    if arrayLen(parts) != 3
      return Err(\"Invalid token format: expected 3 parts\")

    Ok(void)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 디코딩
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn decodeToken
  input: token: string
  output: Result<JwtToken, string>
  intent: \"토큰 디코딩 (검증 없이)\"
  do
    let parts = splitString(token, \".\")

    # Header 디코딩
    let headerStr = arrayGet(parts, 0)
    let headerJson = base64Decode(headerStr)

    # Payload 디코딩
    let payloadStr = arrayGet(parts, 1)
    let payloadJson = base64Decode(payloadStr)

    # Signature
    let signatureStr = arrayGet(parts, 2)

    # JSON 파싱 (Phase B에서 구현)
    let header = parseJwtHeader(headerJson)
    let claims = parseJwtClaims(payloadJson)

    Ok({
      header: header,
      claims: claims,
      signature: signatureStr
    })

fn parseJwtHeader
  input: json: string
  output: JwtHeader
  intent: \"JWT Header 파싱\"
  do
    return {
      alg: \"HS256\",  # 임시
      typ: \"JWT\"
    }

fn parseJwtClaims
  input: json: string
  output: JwtClaims
  intent: \"JWT Claims 파싱\"
  do
    return {
      sub: \"\",
      email: \"\",
      name: \"\",
      role: \"\",
      iat: 0,
      exp: 0
    }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 갱신
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn refreshAccessToken
  input: (refreshToken: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Access Token 갱신\"
  do
    # Refresh Token 검증
    match verifyToken(refreshToken, secret)
      Ok(claims) => {
        # Refresh Token인지 확인
        if claims.role != \"refresh\"
          return Err(\"Not a refresh token\")

        # 새 Access Token 생성
        # userId, email, name을 저장하지 않았으므로 기본값 사용
        match createAccessToken(claims.sub, claims.email, claims.name, \"user\", secret)
          Ok(newToken) => Ok(newToken)
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(\"Invalid refresh token: \" + e)

fn refreshTokenPair
  input: (refreshToken: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<TokenPair, string>
  intent: \"Access + Refresh 토큰 쌍 갱신\"
  do
    # Refresh Token 검증
    match verifyToken(refreshToken, secret)
      Ok(claims) => {
        # 새 토큰 쌍 생성
        match createTokenPair(claims.sub, claims.email, claims.name, \"user\", secret)
          Ok(tokenPair) => Ok(tokenPair)
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(\"Invalid refresh token: \" + e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 내부 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn encodeAndSign
  input: (header: JwtHeader, claims: JwtClaims, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Header와 Claims 인코딩 + 서명\"
  do
    # Header 인코딩
    let headerJson = \"{\\\"alg\\\":\\\"\" + header.alg + \"\\\",\\\"typ\\\":\\\"\" + header.typ + \"\\\"}\"
    let headerEncoded = base64UrlEncode(headerJson)

    # Claims 인코딩
    let claimsJson = \"{\" +
                    \"\\\"sub\\\":\\\"\" + claims.sub + \"\\\",\" +
                    \"\\\"email\\\":\\\"\" + claims.email + \"\\\",\" +
                    \"\\\"name\\\":\\\"\" + claims.name + \"\\\",\" +
                    \"\\\"role\\\":\\\"\" + claims.role + \"\\\",\" +
                    \"\\\"iat\\\":\" + str(claims.iat) + \",\" +
                    \"\\\"exp\\\":\" + str(claims.exp) +
                    \"}\"
    let claimsEncoded = base64UrlEncode(claimsJson)

    # 서명
    let message = headerEncoded + \".\" + claimsEncoded
    let signature = hmacSha256(message, secret)
    let signatureEncoded = base64UrlEncode(signature)

    Ok(message + \".\" + signatureEncoded)

fn verifySignature
  input: (token: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"토큰 서명 검증\"
  do
    let parts = splitString(token, \".\")
    let message = arrayGet(parts, 0) + \".\" + arrayGet(parts, 1)
    let providedSignature = arrayGet(parts, 2)

    let expectedSignature = hmacSha256(message, secret)
    let expectedEncoded = base64UrlEncode(expectedSignature)

    if providedSignature == expectedEncoded
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Signature mismatch\")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct TokenPair
  accessToken: string
  refreshToken: string
  expiresIn: number        # 초
  tokenType: string        # \"Bearer\"

fn getCurrentTimestamp
  input: void
  output: number
  intent: \"현재 타임스탐프 (초)\"
  do
    return 0

fn base64UrlEncode
  input: data: string
  output: string
  intent: \"Base64 URL-safe 인코딩\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 구현
    return \"\"

fn base64Decode
  input: data: string
  output: string
  intent: \"Base64 디코딩\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 구현
    return \"\"

fn hmacSha256
  input: (message: string, secret: string)
  output: string
  intent: \"HMAC-SHA256 서명\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 구현
    return \"\"

fn splitString
  input: (str: string, sep: string)
  output: array<string>
  intent: \"문자열 분할\"
  do
    return []

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

fn arrayLen<T>
  input: arr: array<T>
  output: number
  intent: \"배열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn arrayGet<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, index: number)
  output: T
  intent: \"배열 요소\"
  do
    return arr[0]

content.thinking: 이제 사용자 관리 모듈을 작성해야 한다.

input.content:
# ============================================================================
# auth/user.fl - 사용자 관리
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: 사용자 CRUD, 비밀번호 보안, 검증

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 모델
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct User
  id: number
  email: string
  passwordHash: string      # bcrypt 해시
  name: string
  role: string              # admin, user, guest
  isActive: bool
  createdAt: number         # 타임스탐프
  updatedAt: number
  lastLoginAt: number       # 선택

struct UserCreate
  email: string
  password: string
  name: string
  role: string              # 기본: \"user\"

struct UserUpdate
  name: string              # 선택
  email: string             # 선택
  password: string          # 선택

struct LoginRequest
  email: string
  password: string

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 생성
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn createUser
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"새 사용자 생성\"
  do
    # 입력 검증
    match validateEmail(email)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    match validatePassword(password)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    match validateName(name)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    # 중복 이메일 확인
    # match findUserByEmail(email)
    #   Some(_) => return Err(\"Email already exists\")
    #   None => {}

    # 비밀번호 해싱
    match hashPassword(password, 10)
      Ok(hash) => {
        let now = getCurrentTimestamp()
        let user = {
          id: 0,                  # DB에서 할당
          email: email,
          passwordHash: hash,
          name: name,
          role: \"user\",          # 기본값
          isActive: true,
          createdAt: now,
          updatedAt: now,
          lastLoginAt: 0
        }
        Ok(user)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(\"Failed to hash password: \" + e)

fn createAdmin
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"관리자 사용자 생성\"
  do
    match createUser(email, password, name)
      Ok(user) => {
        let admin = user
        admin.role = \"admin\"
        Ok(admin)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 조회
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn getUserById
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"ID로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [str(userId)])
      Ok(rows) => {
        if arrayLen(rows) == 0
          Ok(None)
        else
          let row = arrayGet(rows, 0)
          let user = rowToUser(row)
          Ok(Some(user))
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn getUserByEmail
  input: (db: Database, email: string)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"이메일로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [email])
      Ok(rows) => {
        if arrayLen(rows) == 0
          Ok(None)
        else
          let row = arrayGet(rows, 0)
          let user = rowToUser(row)
          Ok(Some(user))
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn getAllUsers
  input: (db: Database, limit: number)
  output: Result<array<User>, string>
  intent: \"모든 사용자 조회 (관리자용)\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users LIMIT ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [str(limit)])
      Ok(rows) => {
        let users = []
        for i in 0..arrayLen(rows)
          let row = arrayGet(rows, i)
          users = arrayPush(users, rowToUser(row))
        Ok(users)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 수정
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn updateUser
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, updates: UserUpdate)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 정보 수정\"
  do
    # 사용자 존재 확인
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => return Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 수정 적용
        let updatedUser = user

        if updates.name != \"\"
          match validateName(updates.name)
            Ok(_) => updatedUser.name = updates.name
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        if updates.email != \"\"
          match validateEmail(updates.email)
            Ok(_) => updatedUser.email = updates.email
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        if updates.password != \"\"
          match validatePassword(updates.password)
            Ok(_) => {
              match hashPassword(updates.password, 10)
                Ok(hash) => updatedUser.passwordHash = hash
                Err(e) => return Err(e)
            }
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        updatedUser.updatedAt = getCurrentTimestamp()

        # DB 업데이트
        # saveUser(db, updatedUser)

        Ok(updatedUser)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn updateLastLoginTime
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"마지막 로그인 시간 업데이트\"
  do
    let query = \"UPDATE users SET lastLoginAt = ? WHERE id = ?\"
    let now = str(getCurrentTimestamp())
    match executeSql(db, query, [now, str(userId)])
      Ok(_) => Ok(void)
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 비밀번호 관리
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn validatePassword
  input: password: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 요구사항 검증\"
  do
    # 길이 확인
    if stringLen(password) < 8
      return Err(\"Password must be at least 8 characters\")

    # 대문자 확인
    if !containsUppercase(password)
      return Err(\"Password must contain at least one uppercase letter\")

    # 숫자 확인
    if !containsDigit(password)
      return Err(\"Password must contain at least one digit\")

    Ok(void)

fn hashPassword
  input: (password: string, rounds: number)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 해싱 (bcrypt)\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 bcrypt 호출
    # bcrypt.hash(password, rounds)
    return Ok(\"$2b$10$\" + password)  # 임시

fn verifyPassword
  input: (password: string, hash: string)
  output: Result<bool, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 검증\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 bcrypt 호출
    # bcrypt.compare(password, hash)
    let match_result = password == hash  # 임시
    Ok(match_result)

fn changePassword
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, oldPassword: string, newPassword: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    # 사용자 조회
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => return Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 현재 비밀번호 검증
        match verifyPassword(oldPassword, user.passwordHash)
          Ok(true) => {
            # 새 비밀번호 검증
            match validatePassword(newPassword)
              Ok(_) => {
                # 해싱
                match hashPassword(newPassword, 10)
                  Ok(newHash) => {
                    # DB 업데이트
                    let query = \"UPDATE users SET passwordHash = ? WHERE id = ?\"
                    match executeSql(db, query, [newHash, str(userId)])
                      Ok(_) => Ok(void)
                      Err(e) => Err(e)
                  }
                  Err(e) => Err(e)
              }
              Err(e) => Err(e)
          }
          Ok(false) => Err(\"Current password is incorrect\")
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그인
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn authenticateUser
  input: (db: Database, email: string, password: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 로그인 검증\"
  do
    # 사용자 조회
    match getUserByEmail(db, email)
      Ok(None) => Err(\"Invalid email or password\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 계정 활성화 확인
        if !user.isActive
          return Err(\"Account is inactive\")

        # 비밀번호 검증
        match verifyPassword(password, user.passwordHash)
          Ok(true) => {
            # 마지막 로그인 시간 업데이트
            let _ = updateLastLoginTime(db, user.id)
            Ok(user)
          }
          Ok(false) => Err(\"Invalid email or password\")
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 입력 검증
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn validateEmail
  input: email: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"이메일 검증 (RFC 5322 간단 버전)\"
  do
    # 기본 형식 확인
    if !stringContains(email, \"@\")
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    let parts = splitString(email, \"@\")
    if arrayLen(parts) != 2
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    let localPart = arrayGet(parts, 0)
    let domain = arrayGet(parts, 1)

    if stringLen(localPart) == 0
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    if !stringContains(domain, \".\")
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    Ok(void)

fn validateName
  input: name: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"이름 검증 (1-100자)\"
  do
    let len = stringLen(name)
    if len < 1 || len > 100
      return Err(\"Name must be between 1 and 100 characters\")

    Ok(void)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn rowToUser
  input: row: map<string, string>
  output: User
  intent: \"DB 행을 User 객체로 변환\"
  do
    return {
      id: stringToNumber(row.get(\"id\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      email: row.get(\"email\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      passwordHash: row.get(\"passwordHash\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      name: row.get(\"name\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      role: row.get(\"role\").getOrElse(\"user\"),
      isActive: row.get(\"isActive\").getOrElse(\"true\") == \"true\",
      createdAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"createdAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      updatedAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"updatedAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      lastLoginAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"lastLoginAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0)
    }

fn getCurrentTimestamp
  input: void
  output: number
  intent: \"현재 타임스탐프 (초)\"
  do
    return 0

fn containsUppercase
  input: str: string
  output: bool
  intent: \"대문자 포함 확인\"
  do
    # Phase B에서 구현
    return false

fn containsDigit
  input: str: string
  output: bool
  intent: \"숫자 포함 확인\"
  do
    # Phase B에서 구현
    return false

fn stringLen
  input: str: string
  output: number
  intent: \"문자열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn stringContains
  input: (str: string, substr: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"문자열 포함 확인\"
  do
    return false

fn splitString
  input: (str: string, sep: string)
  output: array<string>
  intent: \"문자열 분할\"
  do
    return []

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

fn stringToNumber
  input: str: string
  output: Option<number>
  intent: \"문자열을 숫자로\"
  do
    return None

fn getOrElse<T>
  input: (opt: Option<T>, default: T)
  output: T
  intent: \"Option 또는 기본값\"
  do
    match opt
      Some(v) => v
      None => default

fn arrayLen<T>
  input: arr: array<T>
  output: number
  intent: \"배열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn arrayGet<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, index: number)
  output: T
  intent: \"배열 요소\"
  do
    return arr[0]

fn arrayPush<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, item: T)
  output: array<T>
  intent: \"배열에 추가\"
  do
    return arr

fn executeQuery
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<array<map<string, string>>, string>
  intent: \"SELECT 쿼리\"
  do
    return Ok([])

fn executeSql
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"SQL 실행\"
  do
    return Ok(void)

# ============================================================================

# 작성: 2026-03-02

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 모델
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct User

  email: string
  passwordHash: string      # bcrypt 해시
  name: string
  role: string              # admin, user, guest
  isActive: bool
  createdAt: number         # 타임스탐프
  updatedAt: number
  lastLoginAt: number       # 선택

struct UserCreate
  email: string
  password: string
  name: string
  role: string              # 기본: \"user\"

struct UserUpdate
  name: string              # 선택
  email: string             # 선택
  password: string          # 선택

struct LoginRequest
  email: string
  password: string

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 생성
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn createUser
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"새 사용자 생성\"
  do
    # 입력 검증
    match validateEmail(email)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    match validatePassword(password)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    match validateName(name)
      Err(e) => return Err(e)
      Ok(_) => {}

    # 중복 이메일 확인
    # match findUserByEmail(email)
    #   Some(_) => return Err(\"Email already exists\")
    #   None => {}

    # 비밀번호 해싱
    match hashPassword(password, 10)
      Ok(hash) => {
        let now = getCurrentTimestamp()
        let user = {
          id: 0,                  # DB에서 할당
          email: email,
          passwordHash: hash,
          name: name,
          role: \"user\",          # 기본값
          isActive: true,
          createdAt: now,
          updatedAt: now,
          lastLoginAt: 0
        }
        Ok(user)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(\"Failed to hash password: \" + e)

fn createAdmin
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"관리자 사용자 생성\"
  do
    match createUser(email, password, name)
      Ok(user) => {
        let admin = user
        admin.role = \"admin\"
        Ok(admin)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 조회
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn getUserById
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"ID로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [str(userId)])
      Ok(rows) => {
        if arrayLen(rows) == 0
          Ok(None)
        else
          let row = arrayGet(rows, 0)
          let user = rowToUser(row)
          Ok(Some(user))
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn getUserByEmail
  input: (db: Database, email: string)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"이메일로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [email])
      Ok(rows) => {
        if arrayLen(rows) == 0
          Ok(None)
        else
          let row = arrayGet(rows, 0)
          let user = rowToUser(row)
          Ok(Some(user))
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn getAllUsers
  input: (db: Database, limit: number)
  output: Result<array<User>, string>
  intent: \"모든 사용자 조회 (관리자용)\"
  do
    let query = \"SELECT * FROM users LIMIT ?\"
    match executeQuery(db, query, [str(limit)])
      Ok(rows) => {
        let users = []
        for i in 0..arrayLen(rows)
          let row = arrayGet(rows, i)
          users = arrayPush(users, rowToUser(row))
        Ok(users)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 사용자 수정
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn updateUser
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, updates: UserUpdate)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 정보 수정\"
  do
    # 사용자 존재 확인
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => return Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 수정 적용
        let updatedUser = user

        if updates.name != \"\"
          match validateName(updates.name)
            Ok(_) => updatedUser.name = updates.name
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        if updates.email != \"\"
          match validateEmail(updates.email)
            Ok(_) => updatedUser.email = updates.email
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        if updates.password != \"\"
          match validatePassword(updates.password)
            Ok(_) => {
              match hashPassword(updates.password, 10)
                Ok(hash) => updatedUser.passwordHash = hash
                Err(e) => return Err(e)
            }
            Err(e) => return Err(e)

        updatedUser.updatedAt = getCurrentTimestamp()

        # DB 업데이트
        # saveUser(db, updatedUser)

        Ok(updatedUser)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

fn updateLastLoginTime
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"마지막 로그인 시간 업데이트\"
  do
    let query = \"UPDATE users SET lastLoginAt = ? WHERE id = ?\"
    let now = str(getCurrentTimestamp())
    match executeSql(db, query, [now, str(userId)])
      Ok(_) => Ok(void)
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 비밀번호 관리
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn validatePassword
  input: password: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 요구사항 검증\"
  do
    # 길이 확인
    if stringLen(password) < 8
      return Err(\"Password must be at least 8 characters\")

    # 대문자 확인
    if !containsUppercase(password)
      return Err(\"Password must contain at least one uppercase letter\")

    # 숫자 확인
    if !containsDigit(password)
      return Err(\"Password must contain at least one digit\")

    Ok(void)

fn hashPassword
  input: (password: string, rounds: number)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 해싱 (bcrypt)\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 bcrypt 호출
    # bcrypt.hash(password, rounds)
    return Ok(\"$2b$10$\" + password)  # 임시

fn verifyPassword
  input: (password: string, hash: string)
  output: Result<bool, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 검증\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 bcrypt 호출
    # bcrypt.compare(password, hash)
    let match_result = password == hash  # 임시
    Ok(match_result)

fn changePassword
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, oldPassword: string, newPassword: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    # 사용자 조회
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => return Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 현재 비밀번호 검증
        match verifyPassword(oldPassword, user.passwordHash)
          Ok(true) => {
            # 새 비밀번호 검증
            match validatePassword(newPassword)
              Ok(_) => {
                # 해싱
                match hashPassword(newPassword, 10)
                  Ok(newHash) => {
                    # DB 업데이트
                    let query = \"UPDATE users SET passwordHash = ? WHERE id = ?\"
                    match executeSql(db, query, [newHash, str(userId)])
                      Ok(_) => Ok(void)
                      Err(e) => Err(e)
                  }
                  Err(e) => Err(e)
              }
              Err(e) => Err(e)
          }
          Ok(false) => Err(\"Current password is incorrect\")
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그인
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn authenticateUser
  input: (db: Database, email: string, password: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 로그인 검증\"
  do
    # 사용자 조회
    match getUserByEmail(db, email)
      Ok(None) => Err(\"Invalid email or password\")
      Ok(Some(user)) => {
        # 계정 활성화 확인
        if !user.isActive
          return Err(\"Account is inactive\")

        # 비밀번호 검증
        match verifyPassword(password, user.passwordHash)
          Ok(true) => {
            # 마지막 로그인 시간 업데이트
            let _ = updateLastLoginTime(db, user.id)
            Ok(user)
          }
          Ok(false) => Err(\"Invalid email or password\")
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 입력 검증
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn validateEmail
  input: email: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"이메일 검증 (RFC 5322 간단 버전)\"
  do
    # 기본 형식 확인
    if !stringContains(email, \"@\")
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    let parts = splitString(email, \"@\")
    if arrayLen(parts) != 2
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    let localPart = arrayGet(parts, 0)
    let domain = arrayGet(parts, 1)

    if stringLen(localPart) == 0
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    if !stringContains(domain, \".\")
      return Err(\"Invalid email format\")

    Ok(void)

fn validateName
  input: name: string
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"이름 검증 (1-100자)\"
  do
    let len = stringLen(name)
    if len < 1 || len > 100
      return Err(\"Name must be between 1 and 100 characters\")

    Ok(void)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn rowToUser
  input: row: map<string, string>
  output: User
  intent: \"DB 행을 User 객체로 변환\"
  do
    return {
      id: stringToNumber(row.get(\"id\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      email: row.get(\"email\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      passwordHash: row.get(\"passwordHash\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      name: row.get(\"name\").getOrElse(\"\"),
      role: row.get(\"role\").getOrElse(\"user\"),
      isActive: row.get(\"isActive\").getOrElse(\"true\") == \"true\",
      createdAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"createdAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      updatedAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"updatedAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0),
      lastLoginAt: stringToNumber(row.get(\"lastLoginAt\").getOrElse(\"0\")).getOrElse(0)
    }

fn getCurrentTimestamp
  input: void
  output: number
  intent: \"현재 타임스탐프 (초)\"
  do
    return 0

fn containsUppercase
  input: str: string
  output: bool
  intent: \"대문자 포함 확인\"
  do
    # Phase B에서 구현
    return false

fn containsDigit
  input: str: string
  output: bool
  intent: \"숫자 포함 확인\"
  do
    # Phase B에서 구현
    return false

fn stringLen
  input: str: string
  output: number
  intent: \"문자열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn stringContains
  input: (str: string, substr: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"문자열 포함 확인\"
  do
    return false

fn splitString
  input: (str: string, sep: string)
  output: array<string>
  intent: \"문자열 분할\"
  do
    return []

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

fn stringToNumber
  input: str: string
  output: Option<number>
  intent: \"문자열을 숫자로\"
  do
    return None

fn getOrElse<T>
  input: (opt: Option<T>, default: T)
  output: T
  intent: \"Option 또는 기본값\"
  do
    match opt
      Some(v) => v
      None => default

fn arrayLen<T>
  input: arr: array<T>
  output: number
  intent: \"배열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn arrayGet<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, index: number)
  output: T
  intent: \"배열 요소\"
  do
    return arr[0]

fn arrayPush<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, item: T)
  output: array<T>
  intent: \"배열에 추가\"
  do
    return arr

fn executeQuery
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<array<map<string, string>>, string>
  intent: \"SELECT 쿼리\"
  do
    return Ok([])

fn executeSql
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"SQL 실행\"
  do
    return Ok(void)

content.thinking: 이제 역할 기반 접근 제어 (RBAC) 모듈을 작성해야 한다.

input.content:
# ============================================================================
# auth/rbac.fl - 역할 기반 접근 제어 (RBAC)
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: 역할 정의, 권한 확인, 접근 제어

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 역할과 권한 정의
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# 역할 (Role)
# - ADMIN: 모든 권한 (관리자)
# - USER: 자신의 데이터 관리 (일반 사용자)
# - GUEST: 읽기만 가능 (손님)

# 권한 (Permission)
# - READ: 조회
# - CREATE: 생성
# - UPDATE: 수정 (자신의 것만)
# - DELETE: 삭제 (자신의 것만)
# - ADMIN: 전체 관리

struct RolePermission
  role: string
  permissions: array<string>

fn getRolePermissions
  input: role: string
  output: array<string>
  intent: \"역할의 권한 목록\"
  do
    match role
      \"admin\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\",
          \"CREATE\",
          \"UPDATE\",
          \"DELETE\",
          \"ADMIN\"
        ]
      }
      \"user\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\",
          \"CREATE\",
          \"UPDATE\",
          \"DELETE\"
        ]
      }
      \"guest\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\"
        ]
      }
      _ => return []

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 접근 제어
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn hasRole
  input: (user: User, requiredRole: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 특정 역할을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    return user.role == requiredRole

fn hasAnyRole
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 역할 중 하나를 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(roles)
      let role = arrayGet(roles, i)
      if user.role == role
        return true
    return false

fn hasAllRoles
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 모든 역할을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(roles)
      let role = arrayGet(roles, i)
      if user.role != role
        return false
    return true

fn hasPermission
  input: (user: User, permission: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 특정 권한을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    let permissions = getRolePermissions(user.role)

    for i in 0..arrayLen(permissions)
      let perm = arrayGet(permissions, i)
      if perm == permission
        return true

    return false

fn hasAllPermissions
  input: (user: User, permissions: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 모든 권한을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(permissions)
      let required = arrayGet(permissions, i)
      if !hasPermission(user, required)
        return false
    return true

fn canAccess
  input: (user: User, resource: string, action: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"접근 권한 확인\"
  do
    # 리소스별 권한 확인
    match resource
      \"todos\" => {
        match action
          \"read\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"READ\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No read permission\")
          }
          \"create\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"CREATE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No create permission\")
          }
          \"update\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"UPDATE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No update permission\")
          }
          \"delete\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"DELETE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No delete permission\")
          }
          \"admin\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"ADMIN\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No admin permission\")
          }
          _ => Err(\"Unknown action\")
      }
      _ => Err(\"Unknown resource\")

fn canAccessOwn
  input: (user: User, resource: string, resourceOwnerId: number, action: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"자신의 리소스만 접근 가능\"
  do
    # 관리자는 모든 리소스 접근 가능
    if user.role == \"admin\"
      return canAccess(user, resource, action)

    # 일반 사용자는 자신의 리소스만 접근 가능
    let userId = user.id
    if userId != resourceOwnerId
      return Err(\"Forbidden: Cannot access other users' resources\")

    canAccess(user, resource, action)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 미들웨어 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn requireRole
  input: (user: User, requiredRole: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"특정 역할 필수\"
  do
    if hasRole(user, requiredRole)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Required role \" + requiredRole)

fn requirePermission
  input: (user: User, permission: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"특정 권한 필수\"
  do
    if hasPermission(user, permission)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Required permission \" + permission)

fn requireAnyRole
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"역할 중 하나 필수\"
  do
    if hasAnyRole(user, roles)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Requires one of the specified roles\")

fn requireAllPermissions
  input: (user: User, permissions: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"모든 권한 필수\"
  do
    if hasAllPermissions(user, permissions)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Missing required permissions\")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 권한 매트릭스
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct PermissionMatrix
  role: string
  canRead: bool
  canCreate: bool
  canUpdate: bool
  canDelete: bool
  canAdmin: bool

fn getPermissionMatrix
  input: role: string
  output: PermissionMatrix
  intent: \"역할의 권한 매트릭스\"
  do
    match role
      \"admin\" => {
        return {
          role: \"admin\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: true,
          canUpdate: true,
          canDelete: true,
          canAdmin: true
        }
      }
      \"user\" => {
        return {
          role: \"user\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: true,
          canUpdate: true,
          canDelete: true,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }
      \"guest\" => {
        return {
          role: \"guest\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: false,
          canUpdate: false,
          canDelete: false,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }
      _ => {
        return {
          role: role,
          canRead: false,
          canCreate: false,
          canUpdate: false,
          canDelete: false,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 감사 로깅
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct AccessLog
  timestamp: number
  userId: number
  resource: string
  action: string
  result: string        # SUCCESS, FORBIDDEN, DENIED
  reason: string        # 이유

fn logAccess
  input: (userId: number, resource: string, action: string, result: string, reason: string)
  output: void
  intent: \"접근 로그 기록\"
  do
    let log = {
      timestamp: getCurrentTimestamp(),
      userId: userId,
      resource: resource,
      action: action,
      result: result,
      reason: reason
    }
    # DB에 저장 (Phase B에서 구현)
    pass

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 역할 관리 (관리자용)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn changeUserRole
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, newRole: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"사용자 역할 변경 (관리자용)\"
  do
    # 역할 유효성 확인
    if newRole != \"admin\" && newRole != \"user\" && newRole != \"guest\"
      return Err(\"Invalid role\")

    # 사용자 존재 확인
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(_)) => {
        # DB 업데이트
        let query = \"UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?\"
        match executeSql(db, query, [newRole, str(userId)])
          Ok(_) => {
            logAccess(userId, \"user_role\", \"update\", \"SUCCESS\", \"Role changed to \" + newRole)
            Ok(void)
          }
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn getCurrentTimestamp
  input: void
  output: number
  intent: \"현재 타임스탐프\"
  do
    return 0

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

fn arrayLen<T>
  input: arr: array<T>
  output: number
  intent: \"배열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn arrayGet<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, index: number)
  output: T
  intent: \"배열 요소\"
  do
    return arr[0]

fn executeQuery
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<array<map<string, string>>, string>
  intent: \"SELECT 쿼리\"
  do
    return Ok([])

fn executeSql
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"SQL 실행\"
  do
    return Ok(void)

fn getUserById
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"ID로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    return Ok(None)

toolUseResult.content:
# ============================================================================
# auth/rbac.fl - 역할 기반 접근 제어 (RBAC)
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: 역할 정의, 권한 확인, 접근 제어

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 역할과 권한 정의
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# 역할 (Role)
# - ADMIN: 모든 권한 (관리자)
# - USER: 자신의 데이터 관리 (일반 사용자)
# - GUEST: 읽기만 가능 (손님)

# 권한 (Permission)
# - READ: 조회
# - CREATE: 생성
# - UPDATE: 수정 (자신의 것만)
# - DELETE: 삭제 (자신의 것만)
# - ADMIN: 전체 관리

struct RolePermission
  role: string
  permissions: array<string>

fn getRolePermissions
  input: role: string
  output: array<string>
  intent: \"역할의 권한 목록\"
  do
    match role
      \"admin\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\",
          \"CREATE\",
          \"UPDATE\",
          \"DELETE\",
          \"ADMIN\"
        ]
      }
      \"user\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\",
          \"CREATE\",
          \"UPDATE\",
          \"DELETE\"
        ]
      }
      \"guest\" => {
        return [
          \"READ\"
        ]
      }
      _ => return []

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 접근 제어
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn hasRole
  input: (user: User, requiredRole: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 특정 역할을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    return user.role == requiredRole

fn hasAnyRole
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 역할 중 하나를 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(roles)
      let role = arrayGet(roles, i)
      if user.role == role
        return true
    return false

fn hasAllRoles
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 모든 역할을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(roles)
      let role = arrayGet(roles, i)
      if user.role != role
        return false
    return true

fn hasPermission
  input: (user: User, permission: string)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 특정 권한을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    let permissions = getRolePermissions(user.role)

    for i in 0..arrayLen(permissions)
      let perm = arrayGet(permissions, i)
      if perm == permission
        return true

    return false

fn hasAllPermissions
  input: (user: User, permissions: array<string>)
  output: bool
  intent: \"사용자가 모든 권한을 가졌는지 확인\"
  do
    for i in 0..arrayLen(permissions)
      let required = arrayGet(permissions, i)
      if !hasPermission(user, required)
        return false
    return true

fn canAccess
  input: (user: User, resource: string, action: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"접근 권한 확인\"
  do
    # 리소스별 권한 확인
    match resource
      \"todos\" => {
        match action
          \"read\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"READ\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No read permission\")
          }
          \"create\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"CREATE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No create permission\")
          }
          \"update\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"UPDATE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No update permission\")
          }
          \"delete\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"DELETE\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No delete permission\")
          }
          \"admin\" => {
            if hasPermission(user, \"ADMIN\")
              Ok(void)
            else
              Err(\"Forbidden: No admin permission\")
          }
          _ => Err(\"Unknown action\")
      }
      _ => Err(\"Unknown resource\")

fn canAccessOwn
  input: (user: User, resource: string, resourceOwnerId: number, action: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"자신의 리소스만 접근 가능\"
  do
    # 관리자는 모든 리소스 접근 가능
    if user.role == \"admin\"
      return canAccess(user, resource, action)

    # 일반 사용자는 자신의 리소스만 접근 가능
    let userId = user.id
    if userId != resourceOwnerId
      return Err(\"Forbidden: Cannot access other users' resources\")

    canAccess(user, resource, action)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 미들웨어 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn requireRole
  input: (user: User, requiredRole: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"특정 역할 필수\"
  do
    if hasRole(user, requiredRole)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Required role \" + requiredRole)

fn requirePermission
  input: (user: User, permission: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"특정 권한 필수\"
  do
    if hasPermission(user, permission)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Required permission \" + permission)

fn requireAnyRole
  input: (user: User, roles: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"역할 중 하나 필수\"
  do
    if hasAnyRole(user, roles)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Requires one of the specified roles\")

fn requireAllPermissions
  input: (user: User, permissions: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"모든 권한 필수\"
  do
    if hasAllPermissions(user, permissions)
      Ok(void)
    else
      Err(\"Forbidden: Missing required permissions\")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 권한 매트릭스
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct PermissionMatrix
  role: string
  canRead: bool
  canCreate: bool
  canUpdate: bool
  canDelete: bool
  canAdmin: bool

fn getPermissionMatrix
  input: role: string
  output: PermissionMatrix
  intent: \"역할의 권한 매트릭스\"
  do
    match role
      \"admin\" => {
        return {
          role: \"admin\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: true,
          canUpdate: true,
          canDelete: true,
          canAdmin: true
        }
      }
      \"user\" => {
        return {
          role: \"user\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: true,
          canUpdate: true,
          canDelete: true,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }
      \"guest\" => {
        return {
          role: \"guest\",
          canRead: true,
          canCreate: false,
          canUpdate: false,
          canDelete: false,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }
      _ => {
        return {
          role: role,
          canRead: false,
          canCreate: false,
          canUpdate: false,
          canDelete: false,
          canAdmin: false
        }
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 감사 로깅
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct AccessLog
  timestamp: number
  userId: number
  resource: string
  action: string
  result: string        # SUCCESS, FORBIDDEN, DENIED
  reason: string        # 이유

fn logAccess
  input: (userId: number, resource: string, action: string, result: string, reason: string)
  output: void
  intent: \"접근 로그 기록\"
  do
    let log = {
      timestamp: getCurrentTimestamp(),
      userId: userId,
      resource: resource,
      action: action,
      result: result,
      reason: reason
    }
    # DB에 저장 (Phase B에서 구현)
    pass

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 역할 관리 (관리자용)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn changeUserRole
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, newRole: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"사용자 역할 변경 (관리자용)\"
  do
    # 역할 유효성 확인
    if newRole != \"admin\" && newRole != \"user\" && newRole != \"guest\"
      return Err(\"Invalid role\")

    # 사용자 존재 확인
    match getUserById(db, userId)
      Ok(None) => Err(\"User not found\")
      Ok(Some(_)) => {
        # DB 업데이트
        let query = \"UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?\"
        match executeSql(db, query, [newRole, str(userId)])
          Ok(_) => {
            logAccess(userId, \"user_role\", \"update\", \"SUCCESS\", \"Role changed to \" + newRole)
            Ok(void)
          }
          Err(e) => Err(e)
      }
      Err(e) => Err(e)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn getCurrentTimestamp
  input: void
  output: number
  intent: \"현재 타임스탐프\"
  do
    return 0

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

fn arrayLen<T>
  input: arr: array<T>
  output: number
  intent: \"배열 길이\"
  do
    return 0

fn arrayGet<T>
  input: (arr: array<T>, index: number)
  output: T
  intent: \"배열 요소\"
  do
    return arr[0]

fn executeQuery
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<array<map<string, string>>, string>
  intent: \"SELECT 쿼리\"
  do
    return Ok([])

fn executeSql
  input: (db: Database, query: string, params: array<string>)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"SQL 실행\"
  do
    return Ok(void)

fn getUserById
  input: (db: Database, userId: number)
  output: Result<Option<User>, string>
  intent: \"ID로 사용자 조회\"
  do
    return Ok(None)

input.content:
# ============================================================================
# layers/auth.fl - 인증 계층 (Authentication Layer)
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: 인증 엔드포인트, 토큰 발급, 로그인/로그아웃

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그인 (POST /auth/login)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleLogin
  input: (db: Database, request: HttpRequest, jwtSecret: string)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/login - 로그인\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseLoginRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(loginReq) => {
        # 사용자 인증
        match authenticateUser(db, loginReq.email, loginReq.password)
          Ok(user) => {
            # 토큰 생성
            match createTokenPair(str(user.id), user.email, user.name, user.role, jwtSecret)
              Ok(tokenPair) => {
                let responseBody = \"{\" +
                                 \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                                 \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                                 \"\\\"accessToken\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.accessToken + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"refreshToken\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.refreshToken + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"expiresIn\\\":\" + str(tokenPair.expiresIn) + \",\" +
                                 \"\\\"tokenType\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.tokenType + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"},\" +
                                 \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"}\"

                Ok({
                  status: 200,
                  headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
                  body: responseBody
                })
              }
              Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::DatabaseError(\"Token generation failed: \" + e))
          }
          Err(_) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(\"Invalid email or password\"))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 회원가입 (POST /auth/register)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleRegister
  input: (db: Database, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/register - 회원가입\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseRegisterRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(registerReq) => {
        # 사용자 생성
        match createUser(registerReq.email, registerReq.password, registerReq.name)
          Ok(user) => {
            # DB 저장
            # match saveUser(db, user)
            #   Ok(savedUser) => {
                let responseBody = \"{\" +
                                 \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                                 \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                                 \"\\\"id\\\":\" + str(user.id) + \",\" +
                                 \"\\\"email\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.email) + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"name\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.name) + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"role\\\":\\\"\" + user.role + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"},\" +
                                 \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"}\"

                Ok({
                  status: 201,
                  headers: {
                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",
                    \"Location\": \"/auth/me\"
                  },
                  body: responseBody
                })
            #   }
            #   Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::DatabaseError(e))
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 갱신 (POST /auth/refresh)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleRefreshToken
  input: (request: HttpRequest, jwtSecret: string)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/refresh - 토큰 갱신\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseRefreshRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(refreshReq) => {
        # Refresh Token 검증
        match refreshAccessToken(refreshReq.refreshToken, jwtSecret)
          Ok(newAccessToken) => {
            let responseBody = \"{\" +
                             \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                             \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                             \"\\\"accessToken\\\":\\\"\" + newAccessToken + \"\\\",\" +
                             \"\\\"expiresIn\\\":900,\" +
                             \"\\\"tokenType\\\":\\\"Bearer\\\"\" +
                             \"},\" +
                             \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                             \"}\"

            Ok({
              status: 200,
              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
              body: responseBody
            })
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(\"Invalid refresh token: \" + e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 현재 사용자 조회 (GET /auth/me)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleGetCurrentUser
  input: (user: User)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: GET /auth/me - 현재 사용자 정보\"
  do
    let responseBody = \"{\" +
                     \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                     \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                     \"\\\"id\\\":\" + str(user.id) + \",\" +
                     \"\\\"email\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.email) + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"name\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.name) + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"role\\\":\\\"\" + user.role + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"\" + str(user.createdAt) + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"},\" +
                     \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"}\"

    Ok({
      status: 200,
      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
      body: responseBody
    })

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 비밀번호 변경 (PUT /auth/password)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleChangePassword
  input: (db: Database, user: User, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: PUT /auth/password - 비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseChangePasswordRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(changeReq) => {
        # 비밀번호 변경
        match changePassword(db, user.id, changeReq.oldPassword, changeReq.newPassword)
          Ok(_) => {
            let responseBody = \"{\" +
                             \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                             \"\\\"message\\\":\\\"Password changed successfully\\\",\" +
                             \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                             \"}\"

            Ok({
              status: 200,
              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
              body: responseBody
            })
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그아웃 (POST /auth/logout)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleLogout
  input: (user: User, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/logout - 로그아웃\"
  do
    # 토큰 무효화 로깅 (Phase B에서 구현)
    # invalidateToken(request.headers.get(\"Authorization\"))

    let responseBody = \"{\" +
                     \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                     \"\\\"message\\\":\\\"Logged out successfully\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"}\"

    Ok({
      status: 200,
      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
      body: responseBody
    })

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 요청 파싱
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn parseLoginRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<LoginRequest, string>
  intent: \"로그인 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let email = extractJsonString(body, \"email\")
    let password = extractJsonString(body, \"password\")

    match (email, password)
      (None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'email' field\")
      (_, None) => Err(\"Missing 'password' field\")
      (Some(e), Some(p)) => {
        Ok({
          email: e,
          password: p
        })
      }

fn parseRegisterRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<RegisterRequest, string>
  intent: \"회원가입 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let email = extractJsonString(body, \"email\")
    let password = extractJsonString(body, \"password\")
    let name = extractJsonString(body, \"name\")

    match (email, password, name)
      (None, _, _) => Err(\"Missing 'email' field\")
      (_, None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'password' field\")
      (_, _, None) => Err(\"Missing 'name' field\")
      (Some(e), Some(p), Some(n)) => {
        Ok({
          email: e,
          password: p,
          name: n
        })
      }

fn parseRefreshRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<RefreshTokenRequest, string>
  intent: \"토큰 갱신 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let refreshToken = extractJsonString(body, \"refreshToken\")

    match refreshToken
      None => Err(\"Missing 'refreshToken' field\")
      Some(token) => {
        Ok({
          refreshToken: token
        })
      }

fn parseChangePasswordRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<ChangePasswordRequest, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let oldPassword = extractJsonString(body, \"oldPassword\")
    let newPassword = extractJsonString(body, \"newPassword\")

    match (oldPassword, newPassword)
      (None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'oldPassword' field\")
      (_, None) => Err(\"Missing 'newPassword' field\")
      (Some(old), Some(new)) => {
        Ok({
          oldPassword: old,
          newPassword: new
        })
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 요청/응답 모델
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct LoginRequest
  email: string
  password: string

struct RegisterRequest
  email: string
  password: string
  name: string

struct RefreshTokenRequest
  refreshToken: string

struct ChangePasswordRequest
  oldPassword: string
  newPassword: string

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn extractJsonString
  input: (json: string, field: string)
  output: Option<string>
  intent: \"JSON에서 문자열 필드 추출\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 구현
    return None

fn getCurrentTime
  input: void
  output: string
  intent: \"현재 시간\"
  do
    return \"2026-03-02T10:30:00Z\"

fn escapeJson
  input: str: string
  output: string
  intent: \"JSON 이스케이프\"
  do
    return str

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

# 외부 함수 (다른 모듈에서 import)
fn authenticateUser
  input: (db: Database, email: string, password: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 인증\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn createUser
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 생성\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn changePassword
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, oldPassword: string, newPassword: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn createTokenPair
  input: (userId: string, email: string, name: string, role: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<TokenPair, string>
  intent: \"토큰 쌍 생성\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn refreshAccessToken
  input: (refreshToken: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Access Token 갱신\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

struct TokenPair
  accessToken: string
  refreshToken: string
  expiresIn: number
  tokenType: string

struct User
  id: number
  email: string
  passwordHash: string
  name: string
  role: string
  isActive: bool
  createdAt: number
  updatedAt: number
  lastLoginAt: number

struct HttpRequest
  method: string
  path: string
  headers: map<string, string>
  queryParams: map<string, string>
  body: string

struct HttpResponse
  status: number
  headers: map<string, string>
  body: string

struct BusinessError
  message: string

fn ValidationError
  input: msg: string
  output: BusinessError
  do
    return { message: msg }

fn DatabaseError
  input: msg: string
  output: BusinessError
  do
    return { message: msg }

fn Database
  input: void
  output: void

toolUseResult.content:
# ============================================================================
# layers/auth.fl - 인증 계층 (Authentication Layer)
# ============================================================================
# Phase 2 구현
# 작성: 2026-03-02
# 책임: 인증 엔드포인트, 토큰 발급, 로그인/로그아웃

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그인 (POST /auth/login)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleLogin
  input: (db: Database, request: HttpRequest, jwtSecret: string)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/login - 로그인\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseLoginRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(loginReq) => {
        # 사용자 인증
        match authenticateUser(db, loginReq.email, loginReq.password)
          Ok(user) => {
            # 토큰 생성
            match createTokenPair(str(user.id), user.email, user.name, user.role, jwtSecret)
              Ok(tokenPair) => {
                let responseBody = \"{\" +
                                 \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                                 \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                                 \"\\\"accessToken\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.accessToken + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"refreshToken\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.refreshToken + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"expiresIn\\\":\" + str(tokenPair.expiresIn) + \",\" +
                                 \"\\\"tokenType\\\":\\\"\" + tokenPair.tokenType + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"},\" +
                                 \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"}\"

                Ok({
                  status: 200,
                  headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
                  body: responseBody
                })
              }
              Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::DatabaseError(\"Token generation failed: \" + e))
          }
          Err(_) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(\"Invalid email or password\"))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 회원가입 (POST /auth/register)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleRegister
  input: (db: Database, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/register - 회원가입\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseRegisterRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(registerReq) => {
        # 사용자 생성
        match createUser(registerReq.email, registerReq.password, registerReq.name)
          Ok(user) => {
            # DB 저장
            # match saveUser(db, user)
            #   Ok(savedUser) => {
                let responseBody = \"{\" +
                                 \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                                 \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                                 \"\\\"id\\\":\" + str(user.id) + \",\" +
                                 \"\\\"email\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.email) + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"name\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.name) + \"\\\",\" +
                                 \"\\\"role\\\":\\\"\" + user.role + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"},\" +
                                 \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                                 \"}\"

                Ok({
                  status: 201,
                  headers: {
                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",
                    \"Location\": \"/auth/me\"
                  },
                  body: responseBody
                })
            #   }
            #   Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::DatabaseError(e))
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 토큰 갱신 (POST /auth/refresh)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleRefreshToken
  input: (request: HttpRequest, jwtSecret: string)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/refresh - 토큰 갱신\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseRefreshRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(refreshReq) => {
        # Refresh Token 검증
        match refreshAccessToken(refreshReq.refreshToken, jwtSecret)
          Ok(newAccessToken) => {
            let responseBody = \"{\" +
                             \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                             \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                             \"\\\"accessToken\\\":\\\"\" + newAccessToken + \"\\\",\" +
                             \"\\\"expiresIn\\\":900,\" +
                             \"\\\"tokenType\\\":\\\"Bearer\\\"\" +
                             \"},\" +
                             \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                             \"}\"

            Ok({
              status: 200,
              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
              body: responseBody
            })
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(\"Invalid refresh token: \" + e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 현재 사용자 조회 (GET /auth/me)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleGetCurrentUser
  input: (user: User)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: GET /auth/me - 현재 사용자 정보\"
  do
    let responseBody = \"{\" +
                     \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                     \"\\\"data\\\":{\" +
                     \"\\\"id\\\":\" + str(user.id) + \",\" +
                     \"\\\"email\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.email) + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"name\\\":\\\"\" + escapeJson(user.name) + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"role\\\":\\\"\" + user.role + \"\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"\" + str(user.createdAt) + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"},\" +
                     \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"}\"

    Ok({
      status: 200,
      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
      body: responseBody
    })

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 비밀번호 변경 (PUT /auth/password)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleChangePassword
  input: (db: Database, user: User, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: PUT /auth/password - 비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    # 요청 파싱
    match parseChangePasswordRequest(request.body)
      Err(e) => return Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      Ok(changeReq) => {
        # 비밀번호 변경
        match changePassword(db, user.id, changeReq.oldPassword, changeReq.newPassword)
          Ok(_) => {
            let responseBody = \"{\" +
                             \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                             \"\\\"message\\\":\\\"Password changed successfully\\\",\" +
                             \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                             \"}\"

            Ok({
              status: 200,
              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
              body: responseBody
            })
          }
          Err(e) => Err(BusinessError::ValidationError(e))
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 로그아웃 (POST /auth/logout)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn handleLogout
  input: (user: User, request: HttpRequest)
  output: Result<HttpResponse, BusinessError>
  intent: \"REST: POST /auth/logout - 로그아웃\"
  do
    # 토큰 무효화 로깅 (Phase B에서 구현)
    # invalidateToken(request.headers.get(\"Authorization\"))

    let responseBody = \"{\" +
                     \"\\\"success\\\":true,\" +
                     \"\\\"message\\\":\\\"Logged out successfully\\\",\" +
                     \"\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"\" + getCurrentTime() + \"\\\"\" +
                     \"}\"

    Ok({
      status: 200,
      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },
      body: responseBody
    })

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 요청 파싱
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn parseLoginRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<LoginRequest, string>
  intent: \"로그인 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let email = extractJsonString(body, \"email\")
    let password = extractJsonString(body, \"password\")

    match (email, password)
      (None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'email' field\")
      (_, None) => Err(\"Missing 'password' field\")
      (Some(e), Some(p)) => {
        Ok({
          email: e,
          password: p
        })
      }

fn parseRegisterRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<RegisterRequest, string>
  intent: \"회원가입 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let email = extractJsonString(body, \"email\")
    let password = extractJsonString(body, \"password\")
    let name = extractJsonString(body, \"name\")

    match (email, password, name)
      (None, _, _) => Err(\"Missing 'email' field\")
      (_, None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'password' field\")
      (_, _, None) => Err(\"Missing 'name' field\")
      (Some(e), Some(p), Some(n)) => {
        Ok({
          email: e,
          password: p,
          name: n
        })
      }

fn parseRefreshRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<RefreshTokenRequest, string>
  intent: \"토큰 갱신 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let refreshToken = extractJsonString(body, \"refreshToken\")

    match refreshToken
      None => Err(\"Missing 'refreshToken' field\")
      Some(token) => {
        Ok({
          refreshToken: token
        })
      }

fn parseChangePasswordRequest
  input: body: string
  output: Result<ChangePasswordRequest, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경 요청 파싱\"
  do
    let oldPassword = extractJsonString(body, \"oldPassword\")
    let newPassword = extractJsonString(body, \"newPassword\")

    match (oldPassword, newPassword)
      (None, _) => Err(\"Missing 'oldPassword' field\")
      (_, None) => Err(\"Missing 'newPassword' field\")
      (Some(old), Some(new)) => {
        Ok({
          oldPassword: old,
          newPassword: new
        })
      }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 요청/응답 모델
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

struct LoginRequest
  email: string
  password: string

struct RegisterRequest
  email: string
  password: string
  name: string

struct RefreshTokenRequest
  refreshToken: string

struct ChangePasswordRequest
  oldPassword: string
  newPassword: string

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 헬퍼 함수
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fn extractJsonString
  input: (json: string, field: string)
  output: Option<string>
  intent: \"JSON에서 문자열 필드 추출\"
  do
    # Phase B 런타임에서 구현
    return None

fn getCurrentTime
  input: void
  output: string
  intent: \"현재 시간\"
  do
    return \"2026-03-02T10:30:00Z\"

fn escapeJson
  input: str: string
  output: string
  intent: \"JSON 이스케이프\"
  do
    return str

fn str
  input: num: number
  output: string
  intent: \"숫자를 문자열로\"
  do
    return \"\"

# 외부 함수 (다른 모듈에서 import)
fn authenticateUser
  input: (db: Database, email: string, password: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 인증\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn createUser
  input: (email: string, password: string, name: string)
  output: Result<User, string>
  intent: \"사용자 생성\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn changePassword
  input: (db: Database, userId: number, oldPassword: string, newPassword: string)
  output: Result<void, string>
  intent: \"비밀번호 변경\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn createTokenPair
  input: (userId: string, email: string, name: string, role: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<TokenPair, string>
  intent: \"토큰 쌍 생성\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

fn refreshAccessToken
  input: (refreshToken: string, secret: string)
  output: Result<string, string>
  intent: \"Access Token 갱신\"
  do
    return Err(\"Not implemented\")

struct TokenPair
  accessToken: string
  refreshToken: string
  expiresIn: number
  tokenType: string

struct User
  id: number
  email: string
  passwordHash: string
  name: string
  role: string
  isActive: bool
  createdAt: number
  updatedAt: number
  lastLoginAt: number

struct HttpRequest
  method: string
  path: string
  headers: map<string, string>
  queryParams: map<string, string>
  body: string

struct HttpResponse
  status: number
  headers: map<string, string>
  body: string

struct BusinessError
  message: string

fn ValidationError
  input: msg: string
  output: BusinessError
  do
    return { message: msg }

fn DatabaseError
  input: msg: string
  output: BusinessError
  do
    return { message: msg }

fn Database
  input: void
  output: void
  do
    return void
